- **[LP-0003 ¬∑ Coverage Climber](loops/testing/LP-0003-coverage-climber.md)** `small` `reviewed` ‚Äî Raises real test coverage one meaningful test file at a time. Targets the riskiest untested code first, and refuses to game the metric. _(tags: testing, coverage, safety-net)_
